entries.name: entitlements-reset-periodic
entries.purpose: Every 15 minutes: reset pool Entitlements past their resets_at boundary. Frequent enough to catch month boundaries in every timezone (UTC-12 to UTC+14).

entries.name: entitlements-reconcile-usage
entries.purpose: Hourly at :10: sync Redis counters to Postgres source-of-truth.

entries.name: entitlements-prune-usage
entries.purpose: Monthly 1st @ 03:30 UTC: DROP old EntitlementUsage partitions past retention.
